summary: First iteration testing of AI Voice Mock Interview MVP. Backend: 7/7 pytest cases passed (root, /api/config shape and ready=false, /api/interview/feedback happy path with full schema validation, empty transcript 400, fallback marker mentions OPENROUTER_API_KEY, invalid payload 422). Frontend: setup form validation (start button disabled until all fields filled), navigation to /interview, Vapi error state 'Voice connection failed' when config not ready, timer element visible, 'Back to setup' works, direct /report navigation correctly redirects to '/'. All flows behave as designed under the empty-key scenario.

minor.issue: `logger` is used inside generate_feedback() at line 207 but defined at module bottom (line 256). Works at request time because Python looks up module globals lazily, but stylistically it should be moved above route handlers. Non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Move `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` above route handlers in /app/backend/server.py for readability.
When real VAPI_PUBLIC_KEY / VAPI_ASSISTANT_ID / OPENROUTER_API_KEY are added, retest the full happy-path voice flow (cannot be tested now).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` defined after it is referenced inside generate_feedback — works but should be moved to the top for clarity.

server.py: `_extract_json` regex only matches non-greedy `{.*?}` inside fences — for a nested JSON payload wrapped in ```json``` fences this could truncate. Current fallback path (`text.find('{')` .. `text.rfind('}')`) is used when no fence match, which handles nested objects correctly. Consider using greedy `\{.*\}` inside the fenced branch too.

InterviewPage.jsx: `liveTurns` useMemo depends only on `transcript` — the partials refs are not part of the dependency array, but this works because setTranscript is called on every partial update (see onMessage 'partial' branch). OK.
ReportPage.jsx: imports `Progress` and then does `void Progress;` to suppress unused-import warnings. Prefer removing the import instead.
No data-testid on 'Back to setup' button in InterviewPage error state — added risk for future tests. Non-blocking (found via role selector).
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this MVP.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The MVP works end-to-end for the degraded-configuration scenario (all API keys empty). To validate the full voice happy path a real VAPI_PUBLIC_KEY + VAPI_ASSISTANT_ID and OPENROUTER_API_KEY must be supplied in /app/backend/.env, after which the LLM path in /api/interview/feedback should be re-verified (currently only the fallback path was exercised). Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py; re-run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`.
rca of the issue: No issues found — all listed features behave as specified.
